description_long: This object consists of three plastic juice bottles, each with a distinct label and color scheme. Two of the bottles are tall and slender, featuring yellow and orange hues with the words 'Aloe Health' and fruit graphics, suggesting flavors like peach and citrus. The third bottle is shorter and wider, predominantly green, and labeled 'Mojito' with images of lime and mint leaves, indicating a mojito-inspired juice flavor. All bottles have screw caps, with the green bottle's cap being more rounded and opaque, while the other two have translucent yellow caps. The labels are vibrant and feature both text and fruit illustrations, making the bottles visually appealing and easy to identify. The bottles are made of clear or tinted plastic, allowing partial visibility of the liquid inside. These juice bottles are typical of those found in urban convenience stores, vending machines, or outdoor refreshment stands.
description: A group of three colorful plastic juice bottles, each with distinct fruit-themed labels and screw caps. The set includes two tall, slender bottles and one shorter, green mojito-flavored bottle.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three bottles: two tall yellow/orange bottles on the left and a green mojito bottle on the right, with clear label details visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the green mojito bottle in front and the two tall bottles aligned behind it, partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the backs of the two tall bottles and the front of the mojito bottle, with label graphics still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the mojito bottle in front and the two tall bottles behind, showing the tops and partial backs of the bottles.
